# Stargraph

> Stateful agent-graph framework with deterministic governance: rules route transitions, not the LLM. Compose LLMs, ML models, tools, and retrieval into auditable, replayable graphs. A governed alternative to LangGraph / CrewAI. Built on Fathom.

Stargraph runs agent workflows as graphs whose node transitions are decided by Fathom (a CLIPS rules engine) over provenance-typed facts — not by an LLM playing router. Every run is replayable and every decision is auditable. Built for regulated, air-gapped, and cleared workloads.

## Documentation
- [Home](https://stargraph.krakn.ai/latest/): What Stargraph is and why rules route transitions.
- [Getting Started](https://stargraph.krakn.ai/latest/getting-started/): Install and run your first graph.
- [Architecture map](https://stargraph.krakn.ai/latest/architecture-map/): How the pieces fit together.

## Tutorials
- [First graph](https://stargraph.krakn.ai/latest/tutorials/first-graph/)
- [Add a Fathom rule pack](https://stargraph.krakn.ai/latest/tutorials/fathom-rules/)
- [Agent with retrieval](https://stargraph.krakn.ai/latest/tutorials/agent-with-retrieval/)
- [Serve and replay](https://stargraph.krakn.ai/latest/tutorials/serve-and-replay/)

## Concepts
- [IR & schema](https://stargraph.krakn.ai/latest/concepts/ir/): The graph intermediate representation.
- [Plugin model](https://stargraph.krakn.ai/latest/concepts/plugins/): Tools, stores, and triggers as plugins.
- [Provenance & replay](https://stargraph.krakn.ai/latest/concepts/provenance/): Why every run is reproducible.
